name: storybreak-desktop
description: StoryBreak — Build Your Story, Card by Card
author: StoryBreak <support@storybreak.app>

scripts.postinstall: mv node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app node_modules/electron/dist/StoryBreak.app 2>/dev/null; printf 'StoryBreak.app/Contents/MacOS/Electron' > node_modules/electron/path.txt; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :CFBundleName StoryBreak' node_modules/electron/dist/StoryBreak.app/Contents/Info.plist 2>/dev/null; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :CFBundleDisplayName StoryBreak' node_modules/electron/dist/StoryBreak.app/Contents/Info.plist 2>/dev/null; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :CFBundleIdentifier app.storybreak.desktop' node_modules/electron/dist/StoryBreak.app/Contents/Info.plist 2>/dev/null; cp icons/icon.icns node_modules/electron/dist/StoryBreak.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns 2>/dev/null; true
